title: IDC Board Meeting — February 2025
agenda:
1. FY2024 Annual Results Review
2. FY2025 Q1 Portfolio Performance
3. Dividend Declaration
4. Privatisation Programme Update
5. Risk Register Review
minutes: The Board reviewed and approved FY2024 annual financial results. Net profit of ZMW 1.1 billion noted. Interim dividend of ZMW 220 million declared. Privatisation mandate for two portfolio companies approved.

resolutions.title: Approval of FY2024 Annual Financial Results
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to approve the FY2024 annual financial statements.

resolutions.title: Interim Dividend Declaration — ZMW 220 Million
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to declare an interim dividend of ZMW 220 million for FY2024 payable to GRZ.

title: ZCCM-IH Board Meeting — February 2025
agenda:
1. FY2024 Annual Results
2. Mine Rehabilitation Fund Review
3. Copper Price Outlook
4. ESG Report
5. Dividend Recommendation
minutes: FY2024 results noted. Mine rehabilitation fund actuarial review commissioned. Dividend of ZMW 275 million recommended to AGM. ESG report approved for publication.

resolutions.title: Mine Rehabilitation Fund Actuarial Review
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to commission an independent actuarial review of mine rehabilitation closure cost estimates.

title: ZESCO Board Meeting — March 2025
agenda:
1. FY2024 Annual Results
2. Tariff Review Progress
3. Kafue Gorge Lower Commissioning Update
4. Load Shedding Reduction Plan
5. Capital Budget Review
minutes: FY2024 results approved. Tariff application to ERB endorsed. Kafue Gorge Lower commissioning target Q2 2025 confirmed. Load shedding reduction plan approved.

resolutions.title: Endorsement of ERB Tariff Application
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to endorse the submission of a cost-reflective tariff application to the Energy Regulation Board.

title: IDC Board Meeting — Scheduled May 2025
agenda:
1. Q1 2025 Portfolio Performance
2. Privatisation Programme Progress
3. FY2024 Final Dividend
4. Risk Register Review
